title: Diving Deeper into 'Running on the Roof of the World'

questions.question: What does "personification" mean?
options: Compares two different things using 'like' or 'as'.
Giving human qualities or actions to objects or animals.
A small part or section taken from a larger text, like a book.
A section of writing, usually made of several sentences, that deals with one main idea.
questions.correct_answer: Giving human qualities or actions to objects or animals.
questions.explanation: "personification" means: Giving human qualities or actions to objects or animals.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Practice finding ______ language in texts.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Practice finding figurative language in texts."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Develop creative writing skills by continuing a narrative.
Analyze characters' feelings and motivations in a story.
Use surrounding words (context) to understand new vocabulary.
Practice finding figurative language in texts.
questions.correct_answer: Use surrounding words (context) to understand new vocabulary.
questions.explanation: Correct! "Use surrounding words (context) to understand new vocabulary." is one of the key things to remember.
